title: Nurture
subtitle: Move deals through the pipeline and assist with contracts to close.

noCampaigns.title: No campaigns yet
noCampaigns.body: Launch a campaign in Activate to start building a pipeline of prospects to nurture.

pickCampaign.title: Pick a campaign
pickCampaign.body: Choose a campaign above to see its pipeline and contracts.

contracts.listEmpty: No contracts generated for this campaign yet.
contracts.comingSoonBody: Pick a deal and a template to draft a contract. Automated drafting isn't wired up yet — generated contracts will appear in the list below once it is.
